name: Masterwork Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Masterwork Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells printing and packaging equipment in China and internationally. It offers cold foil stamping, die cutting, foil stamping, folder gluer, inkjet, inspection, and packer machines. The company was formerly known as Masterwork Machinery Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Masterwork Group Co., Ltd. in July 2017. Masterwork Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Tianjin, China.
